AlgoSec Support Baseline

Target: algosec-lab | Host: orch-lab-01 | Generated: 2026-03-23T22:52:07Z

JSON remains the source of truth. This page is a support-facing render for live comparison during remote customer sessions.

Observed Runtime Identity

Platform: Linux-6.8.0-106-generic-x86_64-with-glibc2.39

Kernel: 6.8.0-106-generic

OS: Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS

Services observed: 223 | Critical services: 0 | Product services: 0 | Listening endpoints: 4

Priority Services

Service Role Hint Tier Score
cron.serviceapplication or support servicesupporting7
multipathd.serviceapplication or support servicesupporting7
systemd-journald.serviceapplication or support servicesupporting7
systemd-udevd.serviceapplication or support servicesupporting7
unattended-upgrades.serviceapplication or support servicesupporting7

Comparison Checkpoints

  • Compare appliance identity first: Confirm the customer host, Rocky 8 baseline, and build markers line up with the trusted lab appliance before deeper diagnosis.
  • Compare critical service state: Verify that the critical services below appear active in the customer environment and match the expected enabled state.
  • Compare routed product endpoints: Use Apache proxy config and local port mappings to confirm the expected AlgoSec routes still point at the right local services.
  • Compare visible listeners: Use the listening-port count and service listener hints as a quick baseline for what should be reachable or bound on the appliance.

Safe First Response

  • Confirm the customer appliance hostname, OS family, and any visible build markers against the lab baseline.
  • Check whether the top AlgoSec services are active and enabled in the customer environment.
  • Compare Apache-routed endpoints and local listener ports before moving into deeper service-specific diagnosis.
  • Use the recorded config and log checkpoints for the top services before inferring broader platform issues.

Unknowns

  • Only first-pass config and log checkpoints are collected in this slice.
  • Dependency mapping between AlgoSec services is not yet collected directly.
